{"base_rev":"a1a766438512c7aeb02fb391a1db24c5fe638acf","classification":"tests_red","detail":"mixed_commit_and_no_changes_rationale","rationale":"The attempt produced an implementation revision, but full verification could not be completed because `go test ./...` failed on `TestWork_WatchKillingWorkerReapsProviderChildWithin5s`; with changed code plus failed verification, this is a red-test outcome rather than an already-satisfied or no-change result.","recommended_action":"release_claim_retry","result_rev":"b70e1f4dc9fe74c327d0602e4d4911e09e568d99","session_id":"eb-426c3dfd","status":"execution_failed","suggested_amendments":[],"suggested_followup_beads":[{"title":"Stabilize work provider orphan reaping integration test","description":"PROBLEM
`cd cli && go test ./...` can fail in this environment because `TestWork_WatchKillingWorkerReapsProviderChildWithin5s` does not observe the stub `codex` child starting within its 10s budget.

ROOT CAUSE
`cli/cmd/work_provider_orphan_linux_test.go` contains a Linux integration test whose child-start readiness wait is timing-sensitive in the current harness environment.

PROPOSED FIX
Make the test's readiness synchronization deterministic or extend the harness setup so the stub provider child startup is reliably observed before the reaping assertion runs.

NON-SCOPE
Do not change bead backend migration behavior or the agent-side concrete store allowlist work from `ddx-13fd73b5`.","acceptance":["1. `TestWork_WatchKillingWorkerReapsProviderChildWithin5s` passes reliably under `cd cli && go test ./cmd -run TestWork_WatchKillingWorkerReapsProviderChildWithin5s -count=1`.","2. `cd cli && go test ./...` passes.","3. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes."],"labels":["phase:iterate","area:work","area:tests","kind:fix","reliability"],"parent":"ddx-09398ba6"}]}
